recentResults.highlight: Priyansh Arya 93(37) & Connolly 87(46) smash 182-run stand — PBKS post season-high 254, stay unbeaten at 5-0
Tilak Varma 101*(45) maiden IPL ton — joint-fastest for MI; Ashwani Kumar 4/24, Bumrah strikes first ball as MI end 4-match slump
Abhishek Sharma 135*(68) — 9th T20 ton equals Kohli's Indian record; Eshan Malinga 4/32, SRH win 3rd on the trot, climb to 3rd
Jadeja 43*(29) rescues RR to 159; Jofra Archer 3/20, Nandre Burger 2/27 defend lowest IPL 2026 total — LSG's 4th straight loss, RR jump to 2nd

storylines.title: Archer and Jadeja drag RR back to 2nd — 159 proves 40 too many for LSG
storylines.body: Rajasthan Royals ended a two-match losing streak in unusual fashion at Ekana on April 22 — defending 159, the lowest total of IPL 2026 so far. Batting first, RR collapsed to 54/4 before Ravindra Jadeja (43* off 29) and impact sub Shubham Dubey stitched an unbeaten 49-run stand to push the total to 159/6. Yashasvi Jaiswal and Dhruv Jurel fell on consecutive deliveries to Mohammed Shami in the 3rd over. Chasing 160, LSG were routed: Jofra Archer (3/20) bowled a maiden over to Nicholas Pooran in the powerplay and returned to flatten Mohammed Shami's leg stump with a late-tailing yorker. Mitchell Marsh's 55 off 41 was the lone resistance; Rishabh Pant was run out for a duck backing up too far. LSG folded for 119 in 18 overs, slumping to their 4th straight loss and 3rd in a row at home. RR climb to 2nd on 10 points, leapfrogging RCB and SRH.

storylines.title: Prince Yadav takes Purple Cap — LSG pacer's 13 wickets despite team's slump
storylines.body: Amid Lucknow's four-match losing streak, one man has emerged as the story of IPL 2026's bowling charts. Prince Yadav now leads the Purple Cap with 13 wickets in 7 matches at an economy of 8.38 — overtaking CSK's Anshul Kamboj on balls-per-wicket. The 24-year-old pacer credits Mohammed Shami's mentorship for his form. He's joined in the top 5 by SRH's Eshan Malinga (12 wkts), GT's Prasidh Krishna (12), and now RR's Jofra Archer (11) after the England speedster's 3/20 against LSG. Four different franchises represented in the top five — IPL 2026's bowling race has never been more competitive.

storylines.title: Abhishek Sharma's 135* equals Kohli's Indian T20 record — SRH level with RCB on 8 pts
storylines.body: Sunrisers Hyderabad thrashed Delhi Capitals by 47 runs at Uppal on April 21, powered by Abhishek Sharma's unbeaten 135 off 68 — his 9th T20 hundred, drawing level with Virat Kohli for most by an Indian. The left-hander brought up his century in 47 balls with a towering six off Nitish Rana and hit 10 fours and 10 sixes, his second entry in the all-time top-five IPL scores. Supporting cameos from Travis Head (37), Ishan Kishan (25) and Klaasen (37*) took SRH to 242/2. Eshan Malinga (4/32) and Harsh Dubey (3/35) ripped through DC. SRH and RCB sit level on 8 points, separated by NRR.

storylines.title: Dhoni watch — Wankhede El Clasico on April 23 is the likely return
storylines.body: MS Dhoni hasn't featured in IPL 2026 yet, sitting out all 6 CSK matches with a calf strain. Batting coach Michael Hussey confirmed Dhoni is batting well but focusing on running fitness. Reports suggest April 23 vs MI at Wankhede — the marquee El Clasico of the IPL — as his most likely return date. With CSK languishing at 8th (2-4, -0.780 NRR) and MI fresh off a 99-run demolition of GT at Ahmedabad, Match 33 could be the blockbuster moment of the tournament.

storylines.title: Tilak Varma's 45-ball maiden IPL ton — MI smash GT by 99 runs to end 4-match slump
storylines.body: Tilak Varma produced one of the great coming-of-age IPL innings at Ahmedabad on April 20, rescuing Mumbai Indians from 103/4 in 14 overs to 199/5 with an unbeaten 101 off 45 balls. The left-hander didn't hit a boundary in his first 20 balls, then exploded for 82 runs in the last six overs — the most anyone has scored in that period in an IPL innings. His century equalled Sanath Jayasuriya's 18-year-old record for the fastest MI hundred. Jasprit Bumrah then struck with the very first ball of the chase and Gujarat Titans folded for 100 in 15.5 overs. Ashwani Kumar (4/24) joint-matched his best IPL figures.

storylines.title: Two captains and a star — Pooran, Parag and Pant's form becomes IPL 2026's biggest concern
storylines.body: Three of the most talked-about batters of IPL 2026 are collectively scraping bottom. Nicholas Pooran has 51 runs in 7 innings at the lowest strike rate in the tournament among batters facing 50+ balls. Rishabh Pant, LSG's Rs.27 Cr captain, was run out backing up too far for a duck against RR — his latest in a string of low scores drawing brutal fan reaction. Riyan Parag has 61 runs in 7 innings as RR captain with a highest of 20. That all three play for teams in the bottom half of the table (LSG 9th, KKR-adjacent territory for RR suddenly makes sense) is no coincidence. Whether any of them figure out form before the playoff race closes will decide three season narratives.
